project.project_title: Applied History - lab for using historical case study to inform contemporary policy
project.source_strategy: Use sources to strengthen cross-field mechanism transfer and academic-stage dependency. Sources should not merely answer a query; they should help move a mechanism from one field into another while marking downstream stages stale when upstream assumptions change.
project.distinctiveness_component_operation: run the task through the project's distinctive mechanism rather than summarizing the project in prose
project.acceptance_test: A reviewer can see why this project could not be swapped with another page without losing the mechanism.
project.best_improvement: Add a replayable demo with before/after state, failure mode, and exported result so the software utility is visible rather than asserted.
project.build_status: source-backed proof build; needs source-to-output capture and close-read strengthening
